name: Nanollose Limited
summary: Nanollose Limited, a biotechnology company, engages in the research and development, and promotion of the microbial nanocellulose technology in Australia. It focuses on the development of Nullarbor, a plant-free viscose-rayon fibre. The company's products are used in textiles, nonwoven fabric, and other industries. Nanollose Limited was founded in 2014 and is based in Nedlands, Australia.
